Fit Yoga Class

FY
by Fit Yoga Studio
128 followers · 12 events · 430 total attendees
Date and time
Saturday, June 14 · 9:00 AM – 10:00 AM EDT
Location
Fit Yoga Studio · New York, NY

About This Event

Join us for 60 minutes of guided vinyasa flow designed to build strength, deepen flexibility, and quiet the noise. Step onto the mat and reconnect with yourself in a warm, welcoming space.

What to Expect

✓ Dynamic vinyasa flow sequences that build heat with intention
✓ Functional bodyweight holds and balances for lean strength
✓ Guided pranayama breathwork and meditation
✓ Deep stretching and savasana to close

Before You Arrive

Bring your yoga mat, a water bottle, and a towel. Wear comfortable clothes you can move freely in. Blocks and straps are provided. All levels are welcome — every pose offers modifications. Please arrive 10 minutes early.

✦ Limited Spots Available
$45 per person
Sat, Jun 14 · 9:00 AM
🧘

All Levels Welcome

Never touched a mat? Seasoned practitioner? Every pose offers modifications. Come as you are.

🎒

What to Bring

Your mat, water bottle, and a towel. Blocks and straps provided if needed.

⏱

60 Min Flow

Centering breathwork, dynamic sequence, deep stretching, and savasana.
